Package org.key_project.logic

VariableNamer.IndProgramElementName, VariableReference, VariableSpecification, VariableSV, VisibilityModifier, Volatile, WarySubstOp, While
public interface SyntaxElement
This interface declares the methods common to all logic related (terms, formulas, programs) AST nodes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SyntaxElement
    getChild(int n)
    Get the n-th child of this syntax element.
    int
    getChildCount()
     
    default SyntaxElementCursor
    getCursor()
     

  • Method Details

    • getChild

      SyntaxElement getChild(int n)
      Get the n-th child of this syntax element.
      Parameters:
      n - index of the child.
      Returns:
      the n-th child of this syntax element.
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if there is no n-th child.

    • getChildCount

      int getChildCount()
      Returns:
      the number of children of this syntax element.

    • getCursor

      default SyntaxElementCursor getCursor()
